scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=heyzuly
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --local --file=./migrations/0001_create_waitlist.sql && wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --local --file=./migrations/0002_create_users.sql && wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --local --file=./migrations/0003_create_messages.sql && wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --local --file=./migrations/0004_create_user_facts.sql && wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --local --file=./migrations/0005_create_waves.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --remote --file=./migrations/0001_create_waitlist.sql && wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --remote --file=./migrations/0002_create_users.sql && wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --remote --file=./migrations/0003_create_messages.sql && wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --remote --file=./migrations/0004_create_user_facts.sql && wrangler d1 execute heyzuly-waitlist --remote --file=./migrations/0005_create_waves.sql
